## Summary

Describe what you changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Docs update
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Style/UI update

## Files Changed

List key files touched.

## Screenshots (if UI changed)

Add before/after screenshots or GIFs.

## Testing

- [ ] Opened locally and checked all affected pages
- [ ] Verified navigation links still work
- [ ] Verified layout on mobile and desktop

## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `master`
- [ ] I tested my changes locally
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
- [ ] Ready for review
